workData.title: Linux Icon Theme (Pebble)
bullets: Designed and developed 'Pebble,' a premium, brand-free squircle icon pack for Linux desktop environments, resulting in a cohesive GTK UI experience.

Managed open-source project lifecycle, handling community contributions, tracking bug reports via GitHub Issues, and defining a product roadmap for expanding multi-platform compatibility (KDE Plasma).

workData.title: Formula SAE Team Manager
bullets: Orchestrated a 50-person engineering division for the design & manufacturing of a Formula Student race car.
Managed workloads, oversaw cross-functional logistics, and presented strategic pitches to secure a 50% increase in corporate funding (Awarded Best Business Presentation, FSAE Australia).
Curated branding assets (logos, brochures) using Adobe Creative Cloud (Photoshop, Illustrator) and produced commercial video content for the team’s social media profiles.
